label: Ledgerhouse Bedchamber
description: Ledgerhouse Bedchamber occupies a cramped upper room of soot-darkened brick, its ceiling crossed by iron tie-rods that match the tavern’s riveted buttressing below. A narrow cot and a square writing table stand beneath a shuttered slit-window glazed with smoke-stained glass, limiting both draft and view to the fortified lanes of Cindervale. A peg rail and lockable chest provide regulated storage, and a laminated placard repeats quarantine and interdiction notices in the same hand as the ordinances wall downstairs. The air carries a permanent taint of lamp oil and ash, absorbed into the boards and bedding.
